description_long: This is a coordinated set of kitchen or storage cabinets and shelves, featuring a combination of tall cupboards, wall-mounted units, and base cabinets. The units are painted in a muted teal color with natural wood countertops, giving a vintage or retro aesthetic. The set includes a tall double-door pantry, a hutch with glass-fronted upper doors, a long base cabinet with a built-in sink and faucet, and several smaller drawer and cupboard units. The doors and drawers are fitted with simple handles, and some upper cabinets have glass panels for display purposes. The overall construction appears to be wood, with metal hardware for handles and hinges, and glass in the upper cabinet doors. This ensemble is suitable for use in urban kitchens, break rooms, or utility spaces, providing ample storage and work surfaces.
description: A vintage-style teal and wood kitchen cabinet set with tall cupboards, wall-mounted units, and a sink base, featuring glass panels and metal handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all cabinet doors, drawers, glass panels, and the sink with faucet.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth of the cabinets and the layered arrangement of the units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the cabinets, with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the staggered placement of the units.
